# TRIVEXA

> TRIVEXA is a premium software development company specializing in enterprise-grade digital platforms, SaaS products, and AI-powered experiences. Founded in 2024. A Triyara Enterprises company.

## About

TRIVEXA builds world-class digital solutions for ambitious businesses. We are a team of senior engineers, designers, and strategists with expertise in fintech, healthtech, e-commerce, and enterprise SaaS. We serve clients across 15+ countries with a 99% client satisfaction rate.

## Services

- Enterprise Website Development: Premium, high-converting websites with 90+ Lighthouse scores
- SaaS Product Engineering: Full-stack multi-tenant SaaS from concept to scale
- AI & Machine Learning Solutions: LLM integration, NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics
- UI/UX Architecture: Research-driven design systems
- Mobile App Development: React Native and Flutter cross-platform apps
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, GCP, Azure infrastructure with Kubernetes
- Digital Transformation: Legacy modernization and process automation
- Performance & CRO: Conversion rate optimization with A/B testing

## Pricing

- Starter: From $3,000 (websites up to 8 pages, 2-3 weeks delivery)
- Growth: From $10,000 (full-stack web apps, 4-6 weeks delivery)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (dedicated teams, SLAs, 24/7 support)

## Guarantees

- 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
- On-Time Delivery Promise (15% credit if missed)
- Full IP & Code Ownership
- 14-Day Risk-Free Trial

## Technologies

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Python, AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, GraphQL, Redis, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, TensorFlow, OpenAI
